summary: Results-driven professional with over 4 years of experience specializing in the intersection of Project management, data analytics and supply chain management. Proven track record in optimizing inventory tracking and fulfillment integrations by leveraging advanced technical tools such as SQL, BigQuery, and PowerBI. Expert in conducting data audits to ensure system integrity and applying regression analysis and forecasting models to drive operational efficiency and informed decision-making. Adept at managing complex project workflows and translating technical data insights into actionable business strategies that enhance product listing accuracy and supply chain performance
